originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Testing Neo-CARBS Hyperparameter Sweeps and Reviewing a Tower Climbing Environment
summary: Tested the Neo-CARBS hyperparameter sweep algorithm on Atari environments, adjusting search bounds and adding score functions for new environments. Reviewed a pull request for a 3D tower climbing puzzle game, providing feedback on network architecture and curriculum learning.
